recommendations.title: Mädchen in Uniform
recommendations.overview: A sensitive girl is sent to an all-girls boarding school and develops a romantic attachment to one of her teachers.

recommendations.title: Cracks
recommendations.overview: Jealousy flares after the headmistress of an elite boarding school for girls becomes obsessed with a new student.

recommendations.title: Noriko's Dinner Table
recommendations.overview: A teenager named Noriko Shimabara runs away from her family in Toyokawa, to meet Kumiko, the leader of an Internet BBS, Haikyo.com. She becomes involved with Kumiko's family circle, which grows darker after the mass suicide of 54 high school girls.

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls are best friends until one dates the other's older brother, who is totally his sister's nemesis.

recommendations.title: While the Wolf's Away
recommendations.overview: A young teen and his misfit group of friends try to escape from a strict boarding school that holds dangerous secrets.

recommendations.title: The Children's Hour
recommendations.overview: An unruly student at a private all-girls boarding school scandalously accuses the two women who run it of having a romantic relationship.

recommendations.title: Picnic at Hanging Rock
recommendations.overview: In the early 1900s, Miranda attends a girls boarding school in Australia. One Valentine's Day, the school's typically strict headmistress treats the girls to a picnic field trip to an unusual but scenic volcanic formation called Hanging Rock. Despite

recommendations.title: Lost and Delirious
recommendations.overview: After starting at an upmarket boarding school, a teenage girl forms close friendships with her two older roommates. However, when she discovers that her new friends are lovers she finds herself caught in a complicated situation.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo and the Ghoul School
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Mystery, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Scooby, Shaggy and Scrappy are on their way to a Miss Grimwood's Finishing School for Girls, where they've been hired as gym teachers. Once there, however, they find that not only is it actually an all-girl school of famous monsters' daughters but th

recommendations.title: Zero for Conduct
recommendations.overview: In a repressive boarding school with rigid rules of behavior, four boys decide to rebel against the director on a celebration day.
